accessibility.nousNousEngageonsA: We commit to responding to any report within 15 business days and to offering an alternative solution if the content cannot be made accessible immediately.
accessibility.oltigoHealthSaposengageA: Oltigo Health is committed to making its platform accessible to all people, including those with disabilities. We continuously work to improve the user experience and apply relevant accessibility standards.
accessibility.publieesParLeW3c: , published by the W3C. These guidelines are the international reference for web content accessibility.
accessibility.siApresNousAvoir: If, after contacting us, you believe your report was not handled satisfactorily, you may contact the Mediator of the Kingdom of Morocco or the competent authority for digital accessibility in your country of residence.
accessibility.siVousRencontrezUn: If you encounter an accessibility barrier on our platform, we invite you to contact us:
accessibility.testAvecLeLecteur: Testing with NVDA (Windows) and VoiceOver (macOS/iOS) screen readers.
accessibility.toutesLesFonctionnalitesPr: : all main features are accessible without a mouse.
accessibility.utilisationDeBalisesHtml: : use of semantic HTML tags (headings, landmarks, labels).

landing.ctaSubtitle: Join healthcare professionals who simplify their practice management with Oltigo.
landing.demoSubtitle: Discover what a practice website built with Oltigo looks like.
landing.editorial.closing-cta-section.cr: Create your account in 2 minutes. No credit card required.
landing.editorial.editorial-footer.laPla: The complete platform to manage your medical clinic in Morocco.
landing.editorial.hero-section.creezLeSi: Create your clinic's website, manage appointments and grow your practice easily.
landing.editorial.hero-section.laPlatefo: The complete platform to manage your medical clinic.
landing.editorial.how-it-works-section.s: Register your clinic in 2 minutes. We configure your secure subdomain.
Add your doctors, services, schedules, and WhatsApp templates.
Your patients book appointments online. Automatic reminders.
Analytics dashboard. Revenue, no-show rate, satisfaction.
landing.editorial.multi-tenant-section.c: Each clinic has its own isolated workspace. Patient data, appointments, and configurations are strictly partitioned by Row Level Security and per-file encryption.
landing.editorial.multi-tenant-section.u: One subdomain per clinic. No data is shared between clinics.
landing.editorial.product-section.appoin: Online appointment booking for your patients. Automatic confirmation, WhatsApp reminders, unified calendar view.
landing.editorial.product-section.patien: AES-256-GCM encrypted records. Full history, prescriptions, results — accessible only by your team.
landing.editorial.product-section.whatsa: 10 Meta-approved Darija templates. Automatic reminders, confirmations, post-consultation follow-up.
landing.editorial.testimonials-section.a: — Dr Fatima B. · Al Amal Clinic · Casablanca
landing.editorial.testimonials-section.d: Since we started using Oltigo, the no-show rate dropped from 32% to 8%. WhatsApp reminders in Darija make the difference — our patients confirm in one minute.
landing.evidenceEncryptionDesc: per-file encryption for patient documents. Unique IV per upload
landing.evidenceUptimeDesc: uptime, last 90 days. Cloudflare Workers, Casablanca + EU edges
landing.featureAppointmentsDesc: Plan, confirm and track all your appointments from a single intuitive interface.
landing.featureAutomationDesc: Automatic reminders, notifications and waiting list management.
landing.featurePatientsDesc: Complete patient records, visit history and centralized medical follow-up.
landing.featureWebsiteDesc: A professional ready-to-use website, accessible on mobile and desktop.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Simple and powerful tools to focus on what matters most: your patients.
landing.heroHeadline: The complete platform to manage your medical practice.
landing.heroSubtitle: Build your practice website, manage appointments and grow your business easily.

pricing.faq1A: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. The difference will be prorated.
pricing.faq1Q: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.faq2A: Absolutely. The Free plan is free forever, no credit card required. It includes up to 2 doctors and 50 patients.
pricing.faq2Q: Is the free plan really free?
pricing.faq3A: Billing is monthly or yearly, your choice. Yearly plans save approximately 17%.
pricing.faq4A: We accept bank cards (CMI) and bank transfers for yearly plans.

privacy.adresseIpTypeDe: IP address, browser type, pages visited.
privacy.ameliorationDeNosServices: Improvement of our services and user experience.
privacy.conformementALaReglementation: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the following rights:
privacy.dansLeCadreDe: As part of our services, we may collect the following data:
privacy.demanderLaposeffacementDeVos: request the erasure of your data.
privacy.informationsMedicalesFourniesLor: medical information provided when booking an appointment (reason for consultation, medical history).
privacy.laPresentePolitiqueDe: This privacy policy describes how Oltigo ("we", "our", "the platform") collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Moroccan Law No. 09-08 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data.
privacy.nomPrenomAdresseEmail: last name, first name, email address, phone number.
privacy.nousMettonsEnUvre: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction. Health data is subject to enhanced protection measures.
privacy.obtenirUneCopieDe: obtain a copy of your personal data.
privacy.recevoirVosDonneesDans: receive your data in a structured format.
privacy.respectDesObligationsLegales: Compliance with legal and regulatory obligations.
privacy.vosDonneesPersonnellesNe: Your personal data is only shared with practitioners and medical staff involved in your care. We do not sell or rent your data to third parties.
privacy.vosDonneesSontConservees: Your data is retained for the period necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, and in accordance with the retention periods required by applicable regulations.
privacy.vosDonneesSontTraitees: Your data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.vousOpposerAuTraitement: object to the processing of your data.

terms.conformementAuReglementGeneral: , in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Moroccan Law No. 09-08 on the protection of personal data.
terms.enAccedantALa: By accessing the Platform, you accept these Terms in their entirety. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the Platform.
terms.laposensembleDesElementsDe: All elements of the Platform (texts, images, logos, source code) are protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction or use is strictly prohibited.
terms.laposespaceDedieAUn: the space dedicated to a clinic or healthcare facility on the Platform.
terms.laposinscriptionNecessiteLaFournit: Registration requires providing accurate and up-to-date information. Each user is responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials. All activity carried out under your account is your responsibility.
terms.laposutilisateurPeutResilierSon: The user may terminate their account at any time from their account settings. In accordance with the GDPR, a complete deletion of data will be performed within 30 days of the request, subject to legal retention obligations.
terms.laposutilisateurSaposengageAUtilis: The user agrees to use the Platform in accordance with applicable laws and these Terms. It is prohibited to use the Platform for unlawful purposes or in ways that infringe upon the rights of third parties.
terms.leProfessionnelDeSante: the healthcare professional or facility subscribing to a plan.
terms.lesDonneesDeSante: Health data is considered sensitive data and is subject to enhanced protection measures, in accordance with the requirements of the CNDP (National Commission for the Control of Personal Data Protection).
terms.lesPaiementsSontEffectues: . Payments are made through accepted payment methods (CMI, bank transfer). Subscriptions are automatically renewed unless previously cancelled.
terms.lesPresentesCguSont: These Terms are governed by Moroccan law. Any dispute relating to the interpretation or execution of these Terms shall be submitted to the competent courts of Casablanca, Morocco.
terms.lesPresentesConditionsGenerales: These Terms of Use (ToU) govern access to and use of the Oltigo platform ("the Platform"), a SaaS service for managing medical, dental, and pharmacy clinics in Morocco.
terms.oltigoSaposengageAFournir: Oltigo is committed to providing a reliable and secure service. The Platform is provided "as is" and Oltigo does not guarantee uninterrupted availability. Oltigo shall not be held liable for medical decisions made based on information displayed on the Platform.
terms.toutePersonneAccedantA: any person accessing the Platform, whether a healthcare professional (doctor, dentist, pharmacist) or a patient.
terms.toutePersonneUtilisantLa: any person using the Platform to book appointments or view their medical information.
